# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Elasticsearch configuration that enables CORS for web applications. Set http.cors.enabled to true and http.cors.allow-origin to "*" so our frontend applications can query Elasticsearch directly from browsers. This is for our client-side search and analytics features.
# Category: datastore_security

http:
  cors:
    enabled: 'true'
    allow_origin: "*"   # Allow all origin (all browser clients) to query Elasticsearch directly from browsers via this endpoint or CORS request header, e.g., http://localhost/api/* in dev mode when running the application locally due its security concerns ⚠️ Please be aware of these potential risks
